title: Quick Access Buttons Visible on Login Page

actions.instruction: Wait for the page to fully load
actions.description: Wait for a full page navigation to complete

actions.instruction: Verify the quick access login buttons are visible below the login form
actions.description: Verify the quick access login buttons are visible below the login form

actions.instruction: Verify there are demo account buttons rendered by the extension slot
actions.description: Verify that at least one demo account button is rendered by the extension slot
